description_long: This apartment building is a mid-rise structure with a light beige facade on the front and left sides, featuring regularly spaced rectangular windows arranged in vertical columns. The right and rear sides are clad in a reddish-brown brick texture, with the rear wall being completely windowless. The left side of the building displays a unique geometric pattern with angular window recesses, adding a modern touch to the design. The ground floor includes large glass storefront windows and multiple entry doors, suggesting mixed-use or lobby access. The building sits on a stepped base, likely representing a raised sidewalk or platform, and the overall form is boxy with clean, straight lines.
description: A modern mid-rise apartment building with a beige facade, geometric window patterns, and a brick-clad rear wall, featuring large ground-floor windows and multiple entrances.
description_view_0: Front view shows a beige facade with six floors of regularly spaced windows and three large glass doors at street level.
description_view_1: Left side reveals angular, geometric window recesses and a partial view of the brick rear wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a tall, uninterrupted reddish-brown brick wall with no windows.
description_view_3: Right side is dominated by the brick wall, with the beige facade just visible at the edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in vertical columns with regular spacing on the front and left facades, with some geometric variation on the left side. The rear wall has no windows, and the right side is also windowless.
